prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约18452→18754→19780→21511→23725，呈持续后移趋势，近5年累计后移约5273名，年均后移约1055名；2025年基准约23725名，较2024年后移约2214名，后移幅度有所加大；2021–2025年物理类招生计划分别为138、140、142、142、145人，逐年小幅扩招；2026年计划145人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招变化，对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 郑州大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第53位持续上升至2026年第44位，创历史最佳排名，学校综合实力和声誉持续提升，对考生吸引力有所增强；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要因全国多省投档线出现溃败，黑龙江物理类最低仅389分录取，引发社会广泛讨论；2026年周期声誉仍偏负面但以中性事件为主（虐猫谣言澄清等舆情管理）；抖音总排名第8（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等物理类主力专业在2026年均为高热推荐/推荐状态，对物理类考生有较强吸引力；湖北省2026年物理类考生约25.2万人，较2025年24.98万人略增约0.2万人，竞争略有加剧；省控线2025年426分，较2024年437分下降11分，卷面难度可能有所变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、软科排名上升至历史最佳（第44位）带来的吸引力增强、抖音高热带来的报考关注度提升，以及湖北省物理类考生略增等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧，位次继续后移但幅度可能因排名上升而有所收窄；预测最低位次约24025名，区间23525–24525名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 18452 → 18754 → 19780 → 21511 → 23725, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 5273 places over the past 5 years, averaging about 1055 places per year; the 2025 baseline is about 23725, a backward shift of about 2214 places compared to 2024, with an increased magnitude; from 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for Physics Category were 138, 140, 142, 142, and 145 respectively, with a slight annual expansion; the 2026 plan is 145, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 53rd in 2021 to 44th in 2026, reaching its best historical ranking, with continuously improving comprehensive strength and reputation, enhancing its appeal to candidates; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was relatively negative, mainly due to a collapse in admission cutoffs across multiple provinces nationwide, with the lowest score in Heilongjiang Physics Category being only 389 points, sparking widespread social discussion; in the 2026 cycle, the reputation remains relatively negative but mainly involves neutral events (such as clarification of cat abuse rumors and other public opinion management); overall ranking on Douyin is 8th (high popularity), with high exposure on short video platforms, leading to relatively high application attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Main majors in Physics Category such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are all highly recommended/recommended in 2026, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Hubei Province is about 252,000, a slight increase of about 2,000 compared to 249,800 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition; the provincial control score in 2025 was 426 points, a decrease of 11 points from 437 points in 2024, indicating possible changes in exam difficulty.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the enhanced appeal from the Soft Science ranking rising to its historical best (44th), the increased application attention due to high popularity on Douyin, and the slight increase in Physics Category candidates in Hubei Province, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with rankings continuing to shift backward but possibly at a reduced magnitude due to the ranking improvement; the predicted minimum ranking is about 24025, with a range of 23525–24525.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 23525–24525, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 flagship majors (Stomatology, Clinical Medicine, Computer Science) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (below 23525), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors; if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 24525), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 and Tier 3 majors, and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 53rd in 2021 to 44th in 2026, reaching its best historical ranking, with continuously improving comprehensive strength and reputation, enhancing its appeal to candidates; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to a collapse in admission cutoffs across multiple provinces nationwide; in the 2026 cycle, reputation remains somewhat negative but dominated by neutral events; overall ranking on Douyin is 8th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, attracting considerable application attention.

专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of main History Category majors is clearly differentiated: Law (diverging and wait-and-see), Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese (recommended), Journalism and Communication (clearly discouraged); in 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Hubei Province is about 141,700, roughly unchanged from 2025's 141,400; the provincial control line in 2025 was 442 points, up 10 points from 2024's 432 points, slightly raising the competition threshold.
